description: Canonical Kernel Corpus answer topics for durable evidence-grounded kernel analysis artifacts.

priorities.P0: Core ntoskrnl concepts that should be answerable from the first Kernel Corpus pack.
priorities.P1: Security and anti-cheat oriented analysis topics built on top of the P0 corpus base.
priorities.P2: Broad reviewable kernel-analysis topics for operational curation beyond the minimum core set.

apc_dpc_timers.title: Kernel support routines for timers and deferred execution
apc_dpc_timers.scope: Public DDI taxonomy for APC, DPC, timer, and worker-thread APIs.

buffer_ioctl.title: Buffer Descriptions for I/O Control Codes

device_objects.title: Introduction to Device Objects
device_objects.scope: Public DEVICE_OBJECT and named-device concept reference.

driver_entry.title: Driver Entry Points in Driver Objects
driver_entry.scope: Public driver object entry point model reference.

driver_verifier.title: Driver Verifier options and rule classes

io_manager.title: Windows Kernel-Mode I/O Manager
io_manager.scope: Public I/O manager and IRP model overview.

ioctl_intro.title: Introduction to I/O Control Codes
ioctl_intro.scope: Public IOCTL and DeviceIoControl flow reference.

kernel_objects.title: Managing Kernel Objects
kernel_objects.scope: Public object manager and kernel object overview.

object_callbacks.title: ObRegisterCallbacks function
object_callbacks.scope: Public object pre/post callback registration contract.

object_lifecycle.title: Life Cycle of an Object
object_lifecycle.scope: Public object reference and lifetime model reference.

object_names.title: Object Names
object_names.scope: Public object namespace and name lookup model reference.

pool_allocation.title: Allocating System-Space Memory
pool_allocation.scope: Public pool allocation guidance and ExAllocatePool2 migration note.

process_notify.title: PsSetCreateProcessNotifyRoutineEx function
process_notify.scope: Public process create/exit callback registration contract.

process_thread_manager.title: Windows Kernel-Mode Process and Thread Manager
process_thread_manager.scope: Public process/thread manager guidance and callback caveats.

security_ref.title: Windows Kernel-Mode Security Reference Monitor
security_ref.scope: Public security reference monitor and Se* DDI overview.

spin_locks.title: Introduction to Spin Locks
spin_locks.scope: Public spin-lock and IRQL synchronization reference.

thread_notify.title: PsSetCreateThreadNotifyRoutine function
thread_notify.scope: Public thread create/delete callback registration contract.

worker_threads.title: System Worker Threads
worker_threads.scope: Public work item and system worker-thread model reference.

topics.title: Process Object Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel creates, publishes, runs down, and deletes process objects using the major functions in this corpus.

topics.title: Thread Object Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel creates, initializes, schedules, exits, runs down, and deletes thread objects using corpus evidence.

topics.title: Object Manager Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain the generic object-manager lifecycle in this kernel: create, insert, reference, handle, close, rundown, and delete.

topics.title: Handle Open Reference Close Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel opens handles, validates access, references objects, closes handles, and releases object references.

topics.title: Object Namespace Lookup
topics.question: Explain how named kernel objects are resolved through object directories, symbolic links, object attributes, and parse/open paths in this corpus.

topics.title: Security Access Check
topics.question: Explain how this kernel checks security descriptors, access masks, privileges, and token state for protected operations.

topics.title: System Call Dispatch Path
topics.question: Explain how this kernel dispatches Nt/Zw system calls from the service entry path to the concrete Nt* implementation.

topics.title: PreviousMode And User Pointer Probe
topics.question: Explain where this kernel distinguishes user-mode and kernel-mode callers and probes user buffers before trusting pointers.

topics.title: Image Section Load Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel maps executable images through section objects and invokes image-load visibility paths.

topics.title: Driver Load And Unload Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel loads a driver image, calls DriverEntry, stores dispatch entry points, and unloads driver resources.

topics.title: Process Thread Image Callback Paths
topics.question: Inventory the process, thread, and image notification callback registration and invocation paths visible in this kernel corpus.

topics.title: Object Callback Registration And Dispatch
topics.question: Explain how this kernel registers and dispatches object callbacks for process, thread, and desktop handle operations.

topics.title: Registry Callback Paths
topics.question: Explain how this kernel registers registry callbacks and dispatches create, set, delete, and close registry operations.

topics.title: I/O Request Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel creates, sends, stacks, completes, and cancels IRPs across driver stacks.

topics.title: IOCTL Buffer Contracts
topics.question: Explain how this kernel receives device-control requests and reasons about IOCTL methods, input buffers, output buffers, and system buffers.

topics.title: Device And Driver Stack
topics.question: Explain how this kernel represents driver objects, device objects, and attached device stacks.

topics.title: PnP And Power IRP Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel routes Plug and Play and power IRPs through device stacks and handles removal or power-state transitions.

topics.title: Pool Allocation Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel allocates, tags, tracks, and frees pool memory, including common failure and verifier-relevant paths.

topics.title: MDL Pin Map Unmap Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel creates MDLs, probes and locks pages, maps locked pages, obtains system addresses, and releases mappings.

topics.title: Virtual Memory Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel allocates, protects, maps, queries, and frees virtual memory for process address spaces.

topics.title: Rundown Reference Patterns
topics.question: Explain the rundown and reference-protection patterns this kernel uses to avoid teardown races.

topics.title: Synchronization IRQL And Locking Rules
topics.question: Explain the synchronization, IRQL, spin-lock, and wait constraints visible in this kernel corpus.

topics.title: APC DPC Work Item And Timer Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel schedules deferred execution through APCs, DPCs, work items, system worker threads, and timers.

topics.title: Exception And Bugcheck Path
topics.question: Explain how this kernel routes exceptions, raises hard failures, and enters bugcheck paths for unrecoverable corruption.

topics.title: Process Identity Sources
topics.question: Explain which kernel paths expose process identity, including process ID, image file name, file object linkage, and token-related identity.

topics.title: Token And Impersonation Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel handles primary tokens, impersonation tokens, subject context capture, and privilege checks.

topics.title: Section File Process Linkage
topics.question: Explain how file objects, section objects, image sections, and process address spaces link together in this corpus.

topics.title: Remote Process Access Flow
topics.question: Explain the corpus-visible paths for opening, querying, reading, writing, and otherwise accessing another process.

topics.title: User Kernel Memory Copy Flow
topics.question: Explain how this kernel copies data between user and kernel address spaces, validates access, and handles cross-process copies.

topics.title: Module Load Visibility
topics.question: Explain the user-image and kernel-image load visibility paths, including image notify callbacks and system image load helpers.

topics.title: Callback Registration Inventory
topics.question: Inventory the major callback registration APIs and internal dispatch paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: Notification Callback Constraints
topics.question: Explain the operational constraints and offload patterns around process, thread, image, registry, and object callbacks in this corpus.

topics.title: Driver Object Dispatch Table
topics.question: Explain how driver objects hold DriverEntry-initialized dispatch tables, unload routines, AddDevice pointers, and major-function handlers.

topics.title: File Object Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain how this kernel creates, initializes, references, cleans up, closes, and deletes file objects.

topics.title: Registry Operation Lifecycle
topics.question: Explain create, open, set, delete, enumerate, callback, and close paths for registry key operations in this kernel corpus.

topics.title: Kernel Telemetry ETW WPP Flow
topics.question: Explain which corpus-visible paths relate to kernel tracing, ETW/WPP-style event publication, and diagnostic visibility.

topics.title: Verifier Failure Classes
topics.question: Explain which corpus-visible paths relate to driver verifier classes such as IRQL checking, pool tracking, I/O verification, deadlock detection, and DMA checks.

topics.title: Low Resource Failure Paths
topics.question: Explain how this kernel handles allocation failure, low-resource simulation, cleanup unwinding, and recoverable failure paths.

topics.title: Lock Hierarchy And Deadlock Risks
topics.question: Explain corpus-visible lock hierarchy, spin lock, resource lock, critical region, rundown, and verifier deadlock-risk paths.

topics.title: Process Protection And Mitigation State
topics.question: Explain how this kernel exposes process protection, signature level, and mitigation policy state using corpus evidence.

topics.title: Handle Duplication And Inheritance
topics.question: Explain how object handles are duplicated, inherited, and associated with process creation or object-manager access paths.

topics.title: Job Object Process Containment
topics.question: Explain how this kernel creates job objects, assigns processes to jobs, queries job state, and terminates contained workloads.

topics.title: ALPC Port And Message Flow
topics.question: Explain ALPC port creation, connection, message dispatch, blob allocation, and send/receive flow visible in this corpus.

topics.title: Token Creation Assignment And Audit
topics.question: Explain token creation, duplication, primary-token assignment, and audit paths relevant to process security state.

topics.title: SID ACL And Security Descriptor Manipulation
topics.question: Explain how this kernel builds, validates, queries, and updates ACL and security descriptor state.

topics.title: Code Integrity And Signature Visibility
topics.question: Explain corpus-visible code-integrity policy, signature level, and process code-integrity state paths.

topics.title: Registry Hive Load Unload And Transaction Flow
topics.question: Explain hive load, unload, rundown, and registry transaction-related paths using major functions in this corpus.

topics.title: File Create Cleanup And Name Normalization
topics.question: Explain file creation, parse/open, cleanup-adjacent, DOS-device name, and name matching paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: Section Mapping And Copy On Write
topics.question: Explain map/unmap section paths, image file maps, and copy-on-write handling in this kernel corpus.

topics.title: VAD Creation Split Merge And Teardown
topics.question: Explain VAD allocation, split, insert-charge, removal, cleanup, and deletion paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: Working Set Trimming And Page Fault Paths
topics.question: Explain working-set aging, trimming, emptying, and page-fault support paths in this kernel corpus.

topics.title: PFN Database And Page State Transitions
topics.question: Explain PFN list assembly, reuse fields, image verification, capture, and page-list transitions visible in this corpus.

topics.title: System Thread Creation And Termination
topics.question: Explain system-thread creation, startup, identity checks, and termination paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: Thread Context And APC Injection Surfaces
topics.question: Explain context get/set paths and APC queueing surfaces relevant to thread manipulation and injection analysis.

topics.title: Debug Object And Debug Port Linkage
topics.question: Explain debug object, debug port, process debug state, and debug-event cleanup paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: ETW Provider Registration And Event Write Paths
topics.question: Explain ETW provider registration, unregister, event write, transfer, and process tracing paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: WMI Registration And Callback Paths
topics.question: Explain WMI registration, notification callback, system control, event write, and query paths visible in this corpus.

topics.title: Object Type Initialization And Type Callbacks
topics.question: Explain object type creation, type arrays, default security descriptors, and type-specific setup paths.

topics.title: Push Lock And Executive Resource Synchronization
topics.question: Explain push-lock and executive-resource initialization, acquire, release, conversion, and deletion paths.

topics.title: Lookaside List And Cache Allocation Paths
topics.question: Explain lookaside-list initialization, allocation, free, and teardown paths used as cache-like allocation mechanisms.

topics.title: Pool Tag Tracking And Special Pool
topics.question: Explain pool-tag tracking, big-pool queries, traced object pool tags, and special-pool verifier paths.

topics.title: IRP Cancellation And Cancel-Safe Queues
topics.question: Explain IRP cancellation, cancel-safe queue initialization, insert, remove, and cancel routine paths.

topics.title: Driver Unload Rundown Hazards
topics.question: Explain driver unload, delete-driver, delete-device, and system-image unload paths that matter for rundown safety.

topics.title: Device Interface And Symbolic Link Flow
topics.question: Explain device-interface registration, interface state changes, symbolic link creation, deletion, and object symbolic-link paths.

topics.title: PnP Device Relation Query Flow
topics.question: Explain PnP device relation queries, invalidation, control queries, and relation-list cleanup paths.

topics.title: Power State Transition And Idle Paths
topics.question: Explain power IRP requests, PoFx device power management, idle-adjacent cleanup, and power dispatch paths.

topics.title: Boot Start Driver Initialization Ordering
topics.question: Explain boot-start driver initialization, built-in driver initialization, service boot-start setup, and driver load ordering paths.

topics.title: Hypervisor And VBS Visibility Boundaries
topics.question: Explain hypervisor detection, hypercall, feature query, active hypervisor processor count, and secure-kernel visibility paths.

topics.title: Secure Kernel And VSL Call Boundary
topics.question: Explain VSL secure-kernel initialization, secure process/thread/section creation, secure handles, and enclave calls.

topics.title: I/O Completion Port Flow
topics.question: Explain I/O completion object creation/opening, completion posting, removal, completion routine, and request completion paths.

topics.title: Server Silo And Container Flow
topics.question: Explain server silo lookup, silo globals, silo context allocation/reference/insert/remove, and host-silo checks.

topics.title: Enclave And Secure Process Flow
topics.question: Explain enclave creation/loading/initialization, secure enclave calls, enclave VADs, and process enclave module state.

topics.title: Hotpatch And Dynamic Relocation Visibility
topics.question: Explain hotpatch metadata capture, secure hotpatch application, image header checks, export lookup, and compressed fixups.

topics.title: Cache Manager File Section Flow
topics.question: Explain cache map initialization, cache flush, purge, file-object lookup from section pointers, and section deletion paths.

topics.title: Kernel Timer2 And Deadline Flow
topics.question: Explain Timer2 and executive timer initialization, set, cancel, and deadline-adjacent timer paths visible in this corpus.
